· A、B 都用这个: · Both A and B use this
· 已显示前 {cap} 门，请缩小范围: · Showing first {cap} courses, please narrow down
<b>无论天气如何</b>，CUSIS 选课与加退选一律照常，<b>不会暂停或延: Regardless of weather, CUSIS course registration and add/drop will proceed as usual, with no suspension or delay. Please follow the login time shown on your CUSIS "Enrolment Dates" page.
一页 A4 的课表，线条清晰，适合打印出来贴在墙上或夹进笔记本。: An A4 timetable with clear lines, ideal for printing and posting on a wall or slipping into a notebook.
上学期（全日制本科，MBChB 除外）：2026-09-07（一）– 2026-: Term 1 (full-time undergraduate, except MBChB): 7 Sep 2026 (Mon) – 5 Dec 2026 (Sat)
不在本专业培养方案内 · not in this programme: Not in this programme’s study scheme · not in this programme
不在本方案内（自由选修 / 通识等）: Not in this scheme (free elective / GE, etc.)
不展示不符合上下班限制的方案: Hide options that don’t fit daily hours
专治「今天吃什么」的选择困难——随机推荐、按口味与距离筛选，做得很顺手。作者手艺: Cure for ‘what to eat today’ indecision—random recommendations, filtered by taste and distance, super handy. The author’s got skills, so we’re giving it a special column for you.
中英文名，如 Computer / 計算機: Name in Chinese and English, e.g. Computer / 計算機
云端已有存档,这台设备上也有内容。用哪份?: Cloud save found, and this device also has data. Which one to use?
从可行排法里选一个作为要导出的方案（下面所有导出方式都只导出这一个）。: Select one from the viable options as the plan to export (all export formats below will only export this one).
从横条移除这个排法（不影响其它排法）: Remove this option from the strip (does not affect other options)
先在信息页选择主修: First select your major on the info page
先在课表页设置上下班时间: First set your daily hours on the timetable page
先在选课页选课，才能导出课表: Select courses on the course selection page first to export timetable
全日制本科在校生按年级分三天，每日 10:00–22:00：: Full-time undergraduate students by year over three days, daily 10:00–22:00:
其中 {n} 门今年未开课，按 3 学分估算: {n} of which not offered this year, estimated at 3 credits
内容据 CUHK 教务处注册及考试组（RES）官方页面整理（原文见本栏顶部链接）: Content compiled from the official CUHK Registration and Examinations Section (RES) page (original text at top link of this column); latest CUSIS/RES announcements prevail.
农历年假：2027-02-05 – 2027-02-11: Lunar New Year break: 5 Feb 2027 – 11 Feb 2027
加退选须持有效且已启用的学习签证/许可。查询：RES 电话 3943 9888、: Add/drop requires a valid and activated study visa/permit. Enquiries: RES tel 3943 9888, fax 2603 5129, ugadmin@cuhk.edu.hk.
只看本专业的课: Only show courses in my major
只读分享链接的有效期为一天，过期后请让对方重新分享。: The read-only sharing link is valid for one day. After expiry, please ask the other party to share again.
只读链接已复制（一天有效）：{url}: Read-only link copied (valid for one day): {url}
可能学（候选课程 · 已隐藏，课表上不再显示）: Potential (candidate course · Hidden, no longer shown on timetable)
因已修互斥课已自动移除: Automatically removed due to a completed mutually exclusive course.
在右侧选择主修培养方案，这里会列出该方案的必修 / 选修 / 分流课程: Select your major programme of study on the right, and its compulsory, elective, and stream courses will be listed here.
在左侧选择当前选择课程，A / B 两种排法会自动排出来: Select courses on the left; two scheduling options, A and B, will be automatically generated.
学分以本学年目录为准；「任选其一」等多组共享、超修情况以 CUSIS 与培养方案: Credit units are based on this academic year's catalogue; where there are shared groups such as 'choose one from', overload, etc., CUSIS and the study scheme shall prevail.
学期起止日期未知：事件自即将到来的对应星期几起按周重复 13 周，仅为估计，请以: Term start and end dates unknown: events will repeat weekly for 13 weeks from the upcoming corresponding weekday; this is an estimate only, please refer to CUSIS.
官方原文 · RES：First Term 2026-27 Course Reg: Official source · RES: First Term 2026-27 Course Registration & Add/Drop
导入失败：文件内容无法识别: Import failed: file content not recognised
导入手机系统日历 / Google Calendar，每周自动重复。周期为按学期: Import to phone calendar / Google Calendar, repeat weekly. The schedule is estimated by term; please verify the actual start and end dates on CUSIS after the term starts.
导出于 {date} · 离线可直接打开 · 时间以 CUSIS 为准: Exported on {date} · Can be opened offline · Times are subject to CUSIS
展开：显示时间/地点/时段选择: Expand: Show time, venue, and session selection
已下载壁纸（纯渐变，无课表），iPhone 比例 1206×2622: Wallpaper downloaded (solid gradient, no timetable), iPhone aspect 1206×2622
已修互斥课，无法添加: Already taken a mutually exclusive course, cannot add
已完成课程按培养方案归类: Completed courses categorised by study scheme
已用本地配置覆盖云端: Local configuration has overwritten the cloud
已登录,当前配置已存云端: Logged in, current configuration saved to cloud
已解锁：可拖动虚线、修改时间，点击重新锁定防止误改: Unlocked: you can drag the dashed line and modify times. Click to lock again to prevent accidental changes.
已退出,本地数据保留在这台设备上: Logged out, local data remains on this device
已锁定：日历上的拖动虚线与下方两个输入框都已禁用，点击解锁: Locked: the draggable dashed line on the calendar and the two input fields below are disabled. Click to unlock.
已隐藏（课表上的试排块已整块移除），点击重新启用: Hidden (the trial block has been removed from the timetable), click to restore.
常用官方链接，选课、注册、查校历、查手册都在这几个站里。: Useful official links: course registration, enrolment, academic calendar, and handbooks can all be found on these sites.
把要上的课、已修过的课、备选课、锁定时段与筛选开关打包成一份 Markdown，: Bundle courses to take, completed courses, shortlisted courses, locked time slots and filter toggles into a Markdown file for backup or cross-device import.
拖到另一栏移动 · 拖到空白处移除: Drag to another column to move · Drag to empty area to remove
按住上下拖动调整时间（15 分钟粒度）: Press and drag up/down to adjust time (15-minute granularity)
时间待定，暂不能加入排课: Time TBC, cannot be added to timetable yet
有先修/成绩等要求，请自查：{text}: Has prerequisites/grade requirements; please check yourself: {text}
未在本学年课程目录中找到，仅供留档: Not found in this academic year’s course catalogue; for record only
本学期没有开设这门课: This course is not offered this term
欢迎逛逛我做的其他站点: Feel free to explore my other sites
点击停用该候选课（课表上的试排块整块移除，去左栏列表点眼睛重新启用）: Click to deactivate this candidate course (trial block will be removed from timetable; click the eye icon in the left-panel list to re-enable)
点击单独查看此排法: Click to view this plan separately
点击隐藏（课表上的试排块整块移除，不影响候选身份）: Click to hide (trial block removed from timetable, but remains a candidate)
独立的自包含网页文件，不依赖网络，离线也能双击打开，内含完整课表，适合长期留存。: Self-contained HTML file, no internet needed; opens offline by double-clicking, contains the full timetable, ideal for long-term archival.
生成一个一天有效的只读链接，手机打开即可查看当前选课与课表，无需登录，对方不能编: Generate a read-only link valid for one day; opens on mobile to view current enrolment and timetable without login; cannot be edited.
用户名只能用 2–32 位字母、数字、点、横线、下划线: Username may only contain 2–32 alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens and underscores
登入时间：10:00am 起 = Year 5+ / 以 Advanced St: Login time: from 10:00am = Year 5+ / Year 4+ admitted with Advanced Standing / Year 3+ admitted with senior-year places; from 11:00am = other students. CUSIS ‘Enrolment Dates’ can be checked from 4 August for personal login time.
登录后配置自动保存到云端,换设备接着排。: After login, settings auto-save to cloud; continue planning on another device.
竖屏壁纸图，把选中的课表铺成手机锁屏背景，顶部留白避开系统时间。导出两张：纯背景: Portrait wallpaper; turns the selected timetable into a phone lock screen background, with top padding to avoid the system clock. Exports two images: background only + with timetable.
粘贴成绩单上的课号，回车录入…: Paste course code from transcript, press Enter to add…
设为 A（回到 A/B 对比）: Set as A (back to A/B comparison)
设为 B（回到 A/B 对比）: Set as B (back to A/B comparison)
该方案暂无结构化清单: This plan has no structured list yet
该方案暂无结构化清单，无法按组拆分，仅统计本方案累计。: This plan has no structured list, cannot split by groups. Only cumulative statistics for this plan are shown.
该方案暂无课程清单: This plan has no course list yet
课表截图，先选画面比例(六选一，也可自定义 w:h)，再导出这张比例的图。: Timetable screenshot: first select aspect ratio (six options, or custom w:h), then export the image at that ratio.
账号已创建,当前配置已存云端: Account created, current configuration saved to cloud
超修申请（Exceeding Term Course Load，逾期不受理）：在: Exceeding Term Course Load (late applications not accepted): current students 24 Jul – 3 Aug (for 14 Aug course selection), 2 Sep – 6 Sep (for 14 Sep add/drop); new students 18–21 Aug (for 1 Sep course selection), 2 Sep – 6 Sep (for add/drop).
还没有候选课程。在中间的课程列表点「可能学」来添加。: No candidate courses yet. Click 'Maybe take' in the middle course list to add.
还没有已完成课程——在上方录入成绩单课号，这里会算出各组已修学分。: No completed courses yet – enter course codes from your transcript above, and credits earned per group will be calculated here.
还没有课程。在中间的课程列表点「必定学」来添加。: No courses yet. Click 'Must take' in the middle course list to add.
这个分享里没有可排的课表: This share contains no arrangable timetable
这些信息用于判断先修与本专业筛选。: This information is used for prerequisite checking and major-specific filtering.
选课之外，选课季也逃不过「今天吃什么」的世纪难题。这里安利一个独立作者做的小工具: Besides course selection, the enrolment season can't escape the eternal question ‘What to eat today’. Here's a handy little tool by an independent developer:
选课准备：在校生 8 月 4 日起查登入时间、8 月 7 日起用 Shoppin: Course selection prep: current students – check enrolment times from 4 Aug, Shopping Cart pre-selection & validate from 7 Aug, upload pre-assigned courses by 12 Aug; new students – 18 Aug / 25 Aug / 28 Aug respectively.
链接已过期或不存在: Link expired or does not exist
（可能学 · 试排，点右上角隐藏）: (Maybe take · trial arrange, click top right to hide)
导出字体尚未就绪，请稍后重试: Font export not ready. Please try again later.
